chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ يَدْخُلُ الْقَبْرَ وَ مَنْ لَا يَدْخُلُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 63 – The one who enters the grave and the one who does not enter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/88)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/88)
text: الرَّجُلُ يَنْزِلُ فِي قَبْرِ وَالِدِهِ وَ لَا يَنْزِلُ الْوَالِدُ فِي قَبْرِ وَلَدِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Salih Bin Al Sindy, from Ja’far Bin Bashir, from Abdullah Bin Rashid,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The man, his son should descend into his grave, and the father should not descend into the grave of his son’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Salih af-Sindiy from Ja‘far ibn Bashir from ’Abd Allah ibn Rashid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a man may enter the grave of his father, but a father should not enter the grave of his sons.”
